title: rubus humulifolius
intro: Rubus humulifolius, also known as the Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus humulifolius include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
